description: Style Note Known for quality and style, allen solly definitely gets it right with these semi-formal trousers. Their blended composition ensures a fitted silhouette. Pair them with a checked short sleeved shirt and kitten heels for Casual Friday dressing. Product Details Khaki trousers, two slant pockets at front with top stitch, facing at waist, zippered fly with snap and button, stretchable Material and Care 98% cotton and 2% spandex Machine wash Warm iron Do not bleach Size and Fit Mid rise, trim fit The model (height 5'8" waist 28") is wearing a size 28
